scopeReview.command: Reviewed current guard profiles, evidence guard, harness regression fixtures, package scripts, AGENT.md, workflow, and decision docs.
scopeReview.summary: Scope covers harness profile split into quick/standard/full, project-context requirement reduction for quick work, stricter browserRuntime passed evidence wording, and related harness regression coverage.

harnessValidate.summary: Harness structure, project rules, documentation line limits, and purity checks passed.

harnessRegression.summary: Harness regression passed with 20 fixture cases, including quick no-context pass, standard diff ownership failure, full data evidence failure, and stricter browserRuntime passed evidence terms.

quickProfile.summary: Quick profile passed without project-context evidence or diff ownership checks for the current harness/docs-only changes.

standardProfile.summary: Standard profile passed: harness validation, token sync, design guard, diff ownership for 10 changed files, baseline verification, and db:check.

dbCheck.summary: Tracked Supabase SQL contract check passed; no DB schema changes were made by this task.

browserRuntime.provider: Current dev server + in-app browser logs
browserRuntime.command: curl http://localhost:3000/; inspect .next/dev/logs/next-development.log delta; inspect in-app browser recent logs
browserRuntime.summary: Current dev server on localhost:3000 responded 200 and first screen HTML rendered. Browser console recent logs showed only React DevTools/HMR messages and no new errors. Server log delta for the check had no app errors. Package change is harness script/profile metadata, not a runtime dependency change.

fullProfile.summary: Full profile passed with evidence guard enabled.

verifyAlias.summary: Existing verify command remains compatible and runs the full policy profile.

issuesObserved: The previous single verify profile made small UI feedback carry the same project-state and evidence overhead as DB/runtime work.
browserRuntime evidence accepted passed text too easily unless server log and console checks were explicitly recorded.
retrospective.reason: This task intentionally changes reusable harness policy to reduce overhead while keeping full evidence checks for higher-risk work.
